_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data ethics and privacy involves using data and emerging data techniques in compliance with ethical and legal obligations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives and data protection, privacy, and ethical obligations.
comments: DDaT skill equal WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.598), RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.596).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.602). Shared vocabulary: [data, ethical, obligations, privacy]. DDaT-only terms [compliance, emerging, ethics, involves, legal, techniques] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, conflicts, identify, monetization, objectives, protection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.887, R=0.896). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.7%). "Data ethics and privacy involves using data and emerging data techniques in comp" and "Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.746 > STS 0.602 (gap +0.143). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, ethical, obligations, privacy] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.7%. Shared tokens: [data, ethical, obligations, privacy]. DDaT-only: [compliance, emerging, ethics, involves, legal, techniques]. WIDAI-only: [ability, conflicts, identify, monetization, objectives, protection].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.143 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
